scripts.deploy: node -e "console.error('Kies expliciet deploy:staging:emdash of deploy:production:emdash'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.build:production:emdash: CF_ACCESS_TEAM_DOMAIN=dry-silence-e2af.cloudflareaccess.com CF_ACCESS_AUDIENCE=000cce177eaf0be0c356b9873108e74763fd7afd8f25d66310952416108a713c EMDASH_PREVIEW_PATH_PATTERN=/cms-preview/{collection}/{id} ENABLE_EMDASH=true npm run build && CF_ACCESS_AUDIENCE=000cce177eaf0be0c356b9873108e74763fd7afd8f25d66310952416108a713c ENABLE_EMDASH=true WORKER_NAME=optimaal-groeien node scripts/patch-wrangler.mjs && node scripts/verify-deploy-config.mjs production
scripts.deploy:production:emdash: node scripts/verify-cloudflare-access.mjs production && npm run build:production:emdash && cd dist/server && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.json --keep-vars
scripts.build:staging:emdash: CF_ACCESS_TEAM_DOMAIN=dry-silence-e2af.cloudflareaccess.com CF_ACCESS_AUDIENCE=b07f4eca9202ce7a51433be4e34cf1e18b9bb6bdd1315da39bc43ab7489f38ce EMDASH_PREVIEW_PATH_PATTERN=/cms-preview/{collection}/{id} ENABLE_EMDASH=true npm run build && CF_ACCESS_AUDIENCE=b07f4eca9202ce7a51433be4e34cf1e18b9bb6bdd1315da39bc43ab7489f38ce ENABLE_EMDASH=true WORKER_NAME=optimaal-groeien-emdash-staging node scripts/patch-wrangler.mjs && node scripts/verify-deploy-config.mjs staging
scripts.deploy:staging:emdash: node scripts/verify-cloudflare-access.mjs staging && npm run build:staging:emdash && cd dist/server && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.json --keep-vars
